script_text: Here is a magical trick in reading. It is called Magic E.
Add an E to the end of a word, and something magical happens.
The vowel starts to say its name.
The word cap has a short A sound.
Watch. Add an E to the end. Cap becomes cape!
The E is silent, but it makes the A say its name: AY!
The word kit has a short I sound.
Add a Magic E. Kit becomes kite!
Now the I says its name: EYE!
The Magic E is silent. But it is super powerful. It changes the vowel!
Now you are ready to spot Magic E words!
